name: P/F BankNordik
summary: P/F BankNordik, together with its subsidiaries, provides various banking products and services for individual and corporate customers in the Faroe Islands and Greenland. The company operates in two segments, Banking and Non-Life Insurance. It provides personal and corporate banking services; a range of property and casualty insurance products under the Trygd brand, and life insurance products under NordikL√É¬≠v brand; and real estate agency services under the Skyn brand. The company operates through a network of six branches. P/F BankNordik is headquartered in T√É¬≥rshavn, Denmark.
